component.name: VideoScene
component.script:
sub init() m.video = m.top.findNode("player") m.video.observeField("state", "onVideoState") m.retryTimer = m.top.findNode("retryTimer") m.retryTimer.observeField("fire", "onRetry") startPlayback() end sub
sub startPlayback() content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") content.url = "http://192.168.139.19:8888/board/index.m3u8?cookieCheck=1" content.streamformat = "hls" content.live = true m.video.content = content m.video.control = "play" m.video.setFocus(true) end sub
' Publisher restarts kill the HLS session server-side; the Video node ' lands in "error" (or "finished") and never retries on its own. sub onVideoState() s = m.video.state if s = "error" or s = "finished" m.video.control = "stop" m.retryTimer.control = "start" end if end sub
sub onRetry() startPlayback() end sub
